caption: In a clinical simulation room, three women sit at a long wooden table. They are wearing dark clothing and white face masks. The woman on the left wears a dark blazer, the woman in the middle wears a dark blazer and holds a pen, and the woman on the right wears a dark zip-up jacket. On the table are several white papers, a blue smartphone, and a teal water bottle. In the background, two computer monitors and a wall clock are visible. A bright magenta banner runs across the bottom of the screen, featuring the text "Day 1", "Admission Orders", and the logo "Sim Week". Across the sequence, the women are engaged in a discussion; while the woman in the middle and the woman on the right remain relatively still, the woman on the left shifts her posture and begins gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points during the conversation.
